title: Old Mardo Pack
description: PVP-focused texture pack. Various tweaks were given to create more flair and personality.
body:
**Old Mardo Pack**
---
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-5865F2?logo=discord&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/A2Nx9kxDeB) [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-1bd96a?logo=modrinth&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://modrinth.com/user/cutebow)
--- This texture pack has various changes from the default texture pack including but not limited to items, particles, and more. A highlight of the texture pack is its FabricSkyBox skies in the overworld and end! Other small tweaks include small totem, small hands besides blocks/weapons/tools, lower shield, and others. ---
**What the pack looks like** ![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/sbCLuXj2/images/6f6b2478b9b17903c49fb3c4570deb005c00e6ff.png)
--- for more detail This texture pack brings a fresh look to Minecraft by changing a bunch of default textures while still keeping the game feeling familiar. It includes updated items, cleaner particles, and a lot of small visual tweaks that make everything look smoother and more polished without going overboard. One of the biggest highlights of the pack is the custom FabricSkyBox skies for both the overworld and the end. The overworld sky feels more alive and atmospheric, and the end gets a completely new vibe that makes exploring or fighting the dragon feel way cooler. Besides the sky changes, the pack adds a bunch of quality-of-life visuals that players usually end up loving. There’s a smaller totem so it doesn’t block half your screen, and your hands become smaller when you're holding nothing, which makes the first-person view look a lot cleaner. Shields are also lowered so they’re not constantly taking up your screen during PvP or survival. You’ll also notice small tweaks to blocks, tools, and items that make everything look just a bit nicer without changing the style too much. Overall, this pack is perfect if you want your game to look better, cleaner, and more modern, while still feeling like classic Minecraft. have any questions? need help? or you just wanna be cool? ⭐ **Then join my Discord!**
